title: Secret Create
description: JSON Schema for the Infisical secret create operation.

workspaceId.description: The ID of the project to create the secret in.

projectSlug.description: The slug of the project to create the secret in.

environment.description: The slug of the environment to create the secret in.

secretPath.description: The path to create the secret in.

secretValue.description: The value of the secret to create.

secretComment.description: Attach a comment to the secret.

tagIds.description: The ID of the tags to be attached to the created secret.

skipMultilineEncoding.description: Skip multiline encoding for the secret value.

type.description: The type of the secret to create.

secretReminderRepeatDays.description: Interval for secret rotation notifications, measured in days.

secretReminderNote.description: Note to be attached in notification email.
